summary: Backend testing for Evolution PRO iteration 26 - Post-Payment Automation & Partnership Activation. All 20 tests passed (100%). Tested Stripe webhook, payment simulation, automation status, partnership activation, discovery auto-approve, email sequence, and email templates.
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe webhook endpoint exists and handles invalid payloads correctly (returns 400/422)
Test payment simulation endpoint (/api/webhooks/test-analisi-payment/{user_id}) works correctly for triggering post-payment automation
Automation status endpoint (/api/webhooks/test-automation-status/{user_id}) returns comprehensive status including payment_confirmed, webhook_processed, analysis_generated, etc.
Partnership activation (/api/flusso-analisi/attiva-partnership/{user_id}) correctly validates contract and payment before activation
Systeme.io integration has graceful degradation - if SYSTEME_API_KEY not configured, flow continues with fallback
Email templates API returns 7 templates including partnership_welcome and lead_sequence_email_1-4
Celery tasks for email automation are properly defined: send_analisi_welcome_email, send_analisi_48h_reminder, send_lead_sequence_email, process_auto_approve_leads

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Backend only testing (UI verified loading correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with pattern test_*@example.com - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-payment automation fully functional. Stripe webhook handles payment_intent.succeeded and checkout.session.completed events. Partnership activation creates Systeme.io sub-account and sends partnership_welcome email. Email templates editable via /api/admin/email-templates. Celery worker running on 'analisi_automation' queue.

stripe_webhook.POST /api/webhooks/stripe: ✅ Endpoint exists, handles invalid payloads correctly
stripe_webhook.signature_verification: ✅ Verifies Stripe signature when STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET configured

partnership_activation.email_sending: ✅ Sends partnership_welcome email via background task

email_sequence.duplicate_prevention: ✅ Returns success=false if sequence already started

email_templates.GET /api/admin/email-templates/{template: ✅ Returns specific template with subject, body_html, variables

post_payment_67_euro: 6. If questionario completed: AI analysis generated, call script generated
partnership_activation: 6. Send partnership_welcome email via background task

mocked_apis.systeme_io: Real integration called. If SYSTEME_API_KEY not configured, operations skipped but flow continues with fallback.
mocked_apis.note: This is graceful degradation, NOT a mock.
